steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank must complete the logical conclusion of the study. The study found "similar correlations between patterns of these factors and of personality traits" across 53 countries — meaning the personality-to-music-preference relationship holds consistently across cultures. The answer must follow directly from that finding.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — the five-factor framework can likely be used to predict preferences for non-Western music styles based on personality traits even if the characteristics of those styles substantially differ from characteristics of Western music styles.: the study only assessed preferences for Western music genres. Extending the framework to non-Western music goes beyond what the data supports. ✗
  • Choice B — the strength of the relationship between personality traits and musical preferences varies less across cultures than researchers had previously assumed.: the study did not compare its results against prior assumptions or previous research. The phrase "previously assumed" is not grounded in anything the passage states. ✗
  • Choice C — people with a relatively high degree of familiarity with Western music styles are likely to express stronger preferences for those styles than people with a relatively low degree of familiarity with those styles are.: familiarity with Western music is never mentioned in the passage. This introduces a variable the study did not measure. ✗
  • Choice D — across cultural contexts, people who share similar profiles of personality traits tend to prefer listening to similar types of Western music.: this follows directly. If personality-factor correlations are similar across 53 countries, then people who share personality profiles will tend to share musical preferences regardless of their cultural context. ✓
That matches Choice D — across cultural contexts, people who share similar profiles of personality traits tend to prefer listening to similar types of Western music..
